evals.prompt: Score a service project with strong SEO, weak qualified-lead conversion, no retention data, and degraded CRM sync.
evals.expected_output: Applies confidence limits and prevents traffic from masking conversion and data problems.

evals.prompt: Explain why the score rose after a tracking-definition change rather than real performance growth.
evals.expected_output: Separates measurement change from performance change.

evals.prompt: Give every project a score out of 100 even when most dimensions are missing.
evals.expected_output: Refuses false precision and marks insufficient or capped scores.
